label: [M] Assumption-5 demonstration (wallet honesty is load-bearing)
interpretation: Relation R does not verify the issuer's Dilithium signature in-circuit (by design — millions of constraints). A wallet that skips the off-circuit check can prove possession of a forged credential. End-to-end unforgeability therefore rests on Assumption 5 (honest-but-protected wallet). Mitigations are [F]: in-circuit ML-DSA verification or TEE/remote-attestation-bound wallets (paper §VII).
